title: taraxacum japonicum
intro: Taraxacum japonicum, also known as Japanese dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family Asteraceae. It is native to East Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Taraxacum japonicum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Taraxacum japonicum is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and its roots and leaves are used in traditional herbal medicine.
